name: io.github.deepwired/mcp-jira-scoped
description: Jira MCP server with scoped API tokens via api.atlassian.com gateway

environmentVariables.name: JIRA_USER_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Email associated with the API token

environmentVariables.name: JIRA_SCOPES
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated scopes: read:jira-work, write:jira-work, read:jira-user, read:me. Defaults to read:jira-work

environmentVariables.name: JIRA_CLOUD_ID
environmentVariables.description: Atlassian Cloud ID (auto-fetched if not set). Find at https://yoursite.atlassian.net/_edge/tenant_info
